# Documentation Configuration
<!-- This file configures the /docs skill for this project. -->
<!-- Generated by: /docs init | 2026-02-10 -->

## Language
- **User-facing docs:** PL
- **Code comments:** EN
- **Changelog notes:** PL

## Source of Truth
<!-- The canonical spec file. When docs drift from this file, docs are wrong. -->
- **File:** `CLAUDE.md`
- **Role:** Main product specification — all docs derive from this

## Documentation Files
<!-- Files managed by /docs update. Set auto-update to "no" for manually maintained files. -->

| File | Purpose | Auto-update |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `docs/index.md` | Docs landing page, links to all sections | yes |
| `docs/pierwsze-kroki.md` | Installation, requirements, quickstart | yes |
| `docs/przewodniki/podstawy.md` | User guide — main workflows | yes |
| `docs/modele-ai.md` | AI models reference (params, limits) | yes |
| `docs/api/architektura.md` | Technical architecture for developers | yes |
| `docs/przewodniki/problemy.md` | Troubleshooting — common issues | yes |
| `README.md` | Project overview (entry point) | no |
| `CONTRIBUTING.md` | Contributor guidelines | no |

## Changelog
- **Location:** `changelog/`
- **Format:** Per-day files `YYYY-MM-DD.md`
- **Type:** Claude-to-Claude notes (private, in .gitignore)
- **Style:** Concise bullet points — what changed, where (file:line), why

## Onboarding
- **Skill path:** `.claude/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md`
- **Invoke:** `/onboard`

## Coverage Areas
<!-- Check off what this project documents. /docs audit uses this to find gaps. -->

- [x] Installation & setup
- [x] User guide (workflows)
- [x] API / Architecture
- [x] Troubleshooting
- [x] Design system / UI
- [x] Data models / Schema
- [ ] Configuration reference
- [ ] Deployment guide

## Conventions
- **Headings:** `#` title, `##` sections, `###` subsections
- **Code blocks:** Always with language tag (typescript, csharp, bash, etc.)
- **Tables:** For parameter lists, comparisons, file inventories
- **Links:** Relative paths within docs/ (e.g., `./przewodniki/podstawy.md`, `../README.md`)
- **Doc names:** Polish (e.g., `pierwsze-kroki.md`, `podstawy.md`)

## File Mapping
<!-- Rules: when source files change, which docs need updating? -->
<!-- Pattern: `src-glob` → `doc-file` (section hint) -->

| Source pattern | Doc file | Section hint |
|---------------|----------|--------------|
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.UI/src/components/**/*.tsx` | `docs/przewodniki/podstawy.md` | UI workflows, inpainting, compare, settings |
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.UI/src/hooks/*.ts` | `docs/przewodniki/podstawy.md` | Hooks (masks, jobs, a11y) |
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.UI/src/lib/models.ts` | `docs/modele-ai.md` | Model definitions, AR, resolutions |
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.UI/src/lib/maskUtils.ts`, `BrushEngine.ts`, `MaskHistory.ts` | `docs/przewodniki/podstawy.md` | Inpainting section |
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.UI/src/lib/api.ts`, `sse.ts` | `docs/api/architektura.md` | Frontend API client |
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.Backend/Services/*.cs` | `docs/api/architektura.md` | Backend services |
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.Backend/Endpoints/*.cs` | `docs/api/architektura.md` | REST endpoints (7 files) |
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.Backend/Options/*.cs` | `docs/api/architektura.md` | Configuration options |
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.Backend/Program.cs` | `docs/api/architektura.md` | Bootstrap, middleware |
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.Backend/Data/AppDbContext.cs` | `docs/api/architektura.md` | Database schema |
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.Shared/Models/*.cs`, `Contracts/*.cs` | `docs/api/architektura.md` | Data models, DTOs |
| `src/RhinoImageStudio.Plugin/**/*.cs` | `docs/api/architektura.md` | Plugin architecture |
| `*.csproj`, `package.json` | `docs/pierwsze-kroki.md` | Dependencies |
| `tailwind.config.js`, `src/RhinoImageStudio.UI/src/index.css` | `docs/api/architektura.md` | Design system |
